Title: Submit valid customer details and receive income form trigger
Preconditions: User is registered and authenticated with valid JWT token, User has not yet completed customer details form
Steps: 1. Authenticate user and obtain JWT token | 2. Send POST request to /api/auth/customer-details with all required fields | 3. Verify response structure | 4. Check user record in database
Test Data: fullName: "John Doe", phoneNumber: "555-123-4567", address: "123 Main St", city: "New York", state: "NY", zipCode: "10001", dateOfBirth: "1990-01-15", ssn: "123-45-6789"
Expected Result: Response status 200, triggerIncomeForm: true returned, nextStep: "income-details", formProgress.customerDetailsCompleted: true, loanApplicationStatus: "in-progress", Oktawave branding colors returned (#2DB5DA, #939598)

Title: Complete full loan application flow from customer to income details
Preconditions: User is registered with valid JWT, Customer details not yet submitted
Steps: 1. POST to /api/auth/customer-details with valid data | 2. Verify triggerIncomeForm: true in response | 3. POST to /api/auth/income-details with valid employment data | 4. Verify completion status | 5. GET /api/auth/form-status to confirm progress
Test Data: Customer: {fullName: "Jane Smith", phoneNumber: "555-987-6543", address: "456 Oak Ave", city: "Boston", state: "MA", zipCode: "02101", dateOfBirth: "1985-06-20", ssn: "987-65-4321"}, Income: {employmentType: "employed", employerName: "Tech Corp", jobTitle: "Engineer", annualIncome: 85000, monthlyIncome: 7083}
Expected Result: Customer details saved successfully, income form triggered, income details saved, formProgress shows both completed: true, loanApplicationStatus: "submitted", nextStep: "document-upload"

Title: End-to-end loan application initiation
Steps: 1. POST to /api/auth/register with user credentials | 2. Use returned JWT token | 3. POST customer details to /api/auth/customer-details | 4. Verify triggerIncomeForm response | 5. POST income details to /api/auth/income-details | 6. GET form status to verify complete workflow
Test Data: Register: {name: "Alice Johnson", email: "alice@example.com", password: "pass123456", role: "client"}, Customer: {fullName: "Alice Johnson", phoneNumber: "555-222-3333", address: "789 Elm St", city: "Chicago", state: "IL", zipCode: "60601", dateOfBirth: "1992-03-10", ssn: "111-22-3333"}, Income: {employmentType: "self-employed", jobTitle: "Consultant", annualIncome: 95000, monthlyIncome: 7916}
Expected Result: User created with token, customer details submission triggers income form correctly, income details accepted, form status shows complete progression through application flow, all database fields populated correctly

Title: Submit customer details with minimum required fields only
Preconditions: Authenticated user, no prior customer details
Steps: 1. POST to /api/auth/customer-details with only required fields (no optional fields) | 2. Verify validation passes | 3. Check database record
Test Data: fullName: "Bob Test", phoneNumber: "5551234567", address: "1 Test Ln", city: "TestCity", state: "TX", zipCode: "12345", dateOfBirth: "1980-01-01", ssn: "000-00-0000"
Expected Result: Status 200, triggerIncomeForm: true, customerDetailsCompleted: true, all required fields saved, optional fields remain undefined/null

Title: Submit income details without optional fields
Preconditions: User has completed customer details form, authenticated
Steps: 1. POST to /api/auth/income-details with only required fields | 2. Omit employerName, jobTitle, additionalIncome, incomeSource | 3. Verify acceptance
Expected Result: Status 200, incomeDetailsCompleted: true, additionalIncome defaults to 0, optional fields null/undefined, loanApplicationStatus: "submitted"

Title: Access form-status before starting application
Preconditions: New registered user with no form submissions
Test Data: Valid JWT for user with no customer/income details submitted
Expected Result: Status 200, formProgress: {customerDetailsCompleted: false, incomeDetailsCompleted: false, documentsUploaded: false}, loanApplicationStatus: "not-started", nextStep: "customer-details"

Title: Retrieve form status after customer details submitted
Preconditions: User completed customer details, not income details
Steps: 1. Complete customer details submission | 2. GET /api/auth/form-status | 3. Verify progress tracking
Test Data: User with customerDetailsCompleted: true, incomeDetailsCompleted: false
Expected Result: Status 200, formProgress reflects customer completed and income not completed, nextStep: "income-details"

Title: Verify Oktawave branding returned in customer-details response
Steps: 1. POST valid customer details | 2. Parse response JSON | 3. Verify branding object structure
Expected Result: Response contains branding.colors.primary: "#2DB5DA", branding.colors.secondary: "#939598", branding.typography.primaryFont: "Proxima Nova, sans-serif", branding.typography.secondaryFont: "Montserrat, sans-serif"

Title: Submit customer details with missing required fields
Steps: 1. POST to /api/auth/customer-details with fullName missing | 2. Repeat for each required field omission
Test Data: {phoneNumber: "5551234567", address: "Test", city: "Test", state: "NY", zipCode: "10001", dateOfBirth: "1990-01-01", ssn: "123456789"}
Expected Result: Status 422, validation error returned with specific field error message (e.g., "Full name is required"), no database update, customerDetailsCompleted remains false

Title: Submit income details before completing customer details
Preconditions: Authenticated user who skipped customer details
Steps: 1. Attempt POST to /api/auth/income-details without prior customer details submission | 2. Verify rejection
Expected Result: Status 400, error message: "Customer details must be completed first", nextStep: "customer-details", incomeDetailsCompleted remains false

Title: Submit customer details with invalid date format
Steps: 1. POST to /api/auth/customer-details with dateOfBirth in wrong format | 2. Verify validation failure
Expected Result: Status 422, validation error: "Valid date of birth is required", no database changes

Title: Submit income details with invalid employment type
Steps: 1. POST to /api/auth/income-details with employmentType not in enum | 2. Verify rejection
Expected Result: Status 422, validation error: "Valid employment type is required", incomeDetailsCompleted remains false

Title: Submit income details with non-numeric income values
Steps: 1. POST to /api/auth/income-details with string values for income | 2. Verify validation
Expected Result: Status 422, validation errors for both income fields: "Annual income must be a number", "Monthly income must be a number"

Title: Access customer-details endpoint without authentication
Steps: 1. Send POST to /api/auth/customer-details without Authorization header | 2. Verify authentication required
Test Data: Valid customer details payload but no token
Expected Result: Status 401, authentication error message, no database access
